message:
wip: MPSGraph deinit works (with leaks), Float32 only

Progress:
- MPSGraph successfully executes 2x2 Float32 matmul
- Fixed C wrapper to not retain graph tensors (owned by graph)
- Fixed deinit order: release MPSGraph before buffers
- Program completes without crash (by not releasing buffers/graph)

Known issues:
- Buffer/graph release crashes (leaking on shutdown)
- BFloat16 not supported in MPSGraph placeholders
- Large matmul (5120x5120) fails - size mismatch (BF16→F32)

Next:
- Add BFloat16→Float32 conversion layer
- Fix memory leaks (buffer/graph release crashes)
- Test with full size matrices
